title: Jason Qareqare
extract:
Jason Qareqare (Fijian pronunciation: [ŋɡareŋɡare]; born 26 January 2004) is a Fijian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a winger for the Castleford Tigers in the Super League.
He has spent time on loan or dual registration at Bradford Bulls in the RFL Championship, and at Midlands Hurricanes in RFL League 1.
